title: hieracium lucidum subsp. cophanense
intro: Hieracium lucidum subsp. cophanense is a rare and lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium lucidum subsp. cophanense include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
